scan.method: content-verified contract read + civilization indices + frontend/docs cross-check
scan.version_policy: Do not infer version/status from filename alone; require contract contents, declarations, comments, authoritative docs, and existing civilization indices.

read_order.role: TempleHeart source of implementation facts; read only
Cross-contract registry and known version drift
Brain and Heart deployment/init wiring; read only
Locked 12345 frontend display claims; read only

heart.name: 五指山悟空財神殿
heart.role: Temple Heart — fortune, heartbeat, ignite, vow, wish, lamp, Brain blood-loop vault

index_status.note: KGEN/README.md documents Token/LP/Genesis addresses but does not list the Heart deployed address. Portal and 12345 runtime display the Heart address as deployed.

version_evidence.evidence: Contract banner says `V3.2.3（單線定稿｜Heart ↔ 11520 Brain 循環版）`.
Contract declaration is `contract KGEN_TempleHeart_V3_2_3 is OwnableLite, ReentrancyGuardLite`; used as supporting evidence, not sole source.
12345 contract row records repo source version `V3_2_3`, plus UI display version `V3_2_6`.
Locked frontend displays `TempleHeart V3.2.6` and Heart address `0xB016D4d8f1aED1339101b30722cad6dbA9B8C972`.
SOP says `不可改 KGEN_TempleHeart_V3_2_6.sol`; no matching V3_2_6 Solidity file was found in the repo during this pass.

role_evidence.evidence: Top comments define Heart as 12345 Wukong Fortune Temple and list fortuneClaim, heartbeatClaim, igniteAndClaim, vowTo, makeWish, and lightLamp.
Top comments state Heart only connects to `11520 花果山台灣交易所 / 悟空大腦（Brain）` as circulation vault.
Species 12345 is `Heart Civilization`, role `Universe Core / Heart Runtime`, and contract repo source is TempleHeart.
Portal node 12345 is live/clickable and displays the Heart address.

status_evidence.evidence: Contract index marks 12345 TempleHeart contract source as `SOURCE_ONLY`.
Frontend text says `Heart 合約已部署` at `0xB016D4d8f1aED1339101b30722cad6dbA9B8C972`.
KGEN index records `portal_displayed_deployed` Heart 12345 with the same address and contract ref.
KGEN README is authoritative for Token/LP/Genesis addresses, but does not document the Heart address.

filename_inference_guard.rule: Filename is not the source of truth for version/status.
filename_inference_guard.result: Heart has an active conflict: repo source contents and declaration verify V3.2.3, while locked frontend/SOP labels cite V3.2.6 and no V3_2_6 Solidity source exists in repo.

user_actions.rules: 1..888 KGEN, 30 day cooldown, optional epoch cap of 500 claims.
Default 1 hour cooldown, default 1 KGEN reward.
UTC 00:00-00:10 once per day, default 8 KGEN reward.
transferFrom user to Heart for blood refill.
Emits hash only; no plaintext wish stored.

brain_loop_actions.mechanism: Pulls KGEN from Brain to Heart; Brain must approve Heart first.
Sends Heart balance above effective cap back to Brain.
Pulls from Brain if Heart is below effective floor; Brain must approve Heart first.

runtime_links.via: heart.setToken(KGEN_TOKEN); Heart transfers KGEN for rewards and accepts KGEN for vow/lamp/fund flows.
brain.setTempleHeart plus Heart brainVault; Brain/Heart blood-loop.
optional lingxiaoBank organ address placeholder; not enforced in this Heart version.

kgen_layer.meaning: KGEN chain layer records Heart as portal-displayed deployed and maps 12345 to TempleHeart.

contract_layer.meaning: Contract registry records 12345 TempleHeart source, dependency graph, and active V3.2.3/V3.2.6 conflict.

temple_12345.meaning: 12345 is the primary Heart runtime and locked UI surface.

brain_11520.mechanism: Brain deploy/init sets TempleHeart and Heart stores Brain as brainVault.

portal_12345.mechanism: Portal node 12345 is live/clickable and displays the Heart deployed address.

active_conflicts.repo_source_evidence: Source banner, contract declaration, deploy_all.js factory, CONTRACT_INDEX, and TEMPLE_12345_INDEX all point to V3.2.3 source.
ui_sop_evidence: K線西遊記/temples/12345/index.html displays TempleHeart V3.2.6.
active_conflicts.observed_gap: No KGEN_TempleHeart_V3_2_6.sol file was found in repo during this pass.
active_conflicts.action: Do not relabel the source or runtime. Treat V3.2.6 as an unresolved UI/SOP/deployment label until a verified source, migration note, or chain verification artifact is added.

active_conflicts.observed_gap: KGEN/README.md does not list Heart deployed address; this pass did not perform external chain explorer or RPC verification.

known_gaps.detail: Frontend/SOP cite V3.2.6, but repo only contains V3.2.3 TempleHeart source.
Heart address is present in Portal/12345 UI and civilization indices, but not in KGEN/README.md's authoritative on-chain address list.
No RPC or explorer verification was performed. Address/deployment statements are indexed as repo/frontend claims, not external proof.
Heart source requires Brain to approve Heart before inject/autoRefill transferFrom flows; this pass found wiring but no authoritative live allowance record.

governance_lock.source_of_truth_note: This index documents evidence and conflicts only; it does not resolve runtime/source version drift.
